Parameter.Name: timeString

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the customer that wants to change the service in their appointment.

Parameter.Name: customerName

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the new service to be updated in the appointment.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the new service to be updated in the appointment.
Parameter.Name: newService

Parameter.Documentation: is the date and the time where the attempt for the change happened. This method is called when a customer wants to change the service in their appointment.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the date and the time where the attempt for the change happened. This method is called when a customer wants to change the service in their appointment.
Parameter.Name: dateAndTime

Parameter.Documentation: is the date and time where the appointment is starting.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the date and time where the appointment is starting.
Parameter.Name: dateAndTime

Parameter.Documentation: This method is called when it is needed to check if a certain service in the appointment is the correct one.

Parameter.Name: serviceName

Parameter.Documentation: is the username of the customer
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the username of the customer
Parameter.Name: username

Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the desired new day of the appointment
Parameter.Name: newDateString

Parameter.Documentation: is the desired new start time of the appointment
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the desired new start time of the appointment
Parameter.Name: newTimeString

Parameter.Documentation: is the current time and date of the system
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the current time and date of the system
Parameter.Name: systemTime

Parameter.Documentation: is the date and the time where the owner tried to register a no-show.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the date and the time where the owner tried to register a no-show.
Parameter.Name: currentDateAndTime

Parameter.Documentation: is the date and time where the owner tries to end the appointment.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the date and time where the owner tries to end the appointment.
Parameter.Name: dateAndTime

Operation.Documentation:
Helper method to find a specific user

@author Eric Chehata
Operation.Documentation_plain: Helper method to find a specific user @author Eric Chehata
Operation.Name: findUser
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: User sought if found, null otherwise
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: User sought if found, null otherwise

Operation.Documentation:
findSerivceComboThis helper method has the goal of finding a specific service combo holding the name put as the input.To do that the method iterates over all the bookable services in the flexibook using a for loop.For each bookable service, if it is a service combo and it has the same name as the one in the input,then it is the service combo we are looking for and it is then returned by the method.

@author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Documentation_plain: findSerivceComboThis helper method has the goal of finding a specific service combo holding the name put as the input.To do that the method iterates over all the bookable services in the flexibook using a for loop.For each bookable service, if it is a service combo and it has the same name as the one in the input,then it is the service combo we are looking for and it is then returned by the method. @author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Name: findServiceCombo
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: ServiceCombo that has the name as the parameter serviceCombo.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: ServiceCombo that has the name as the parameter serviceCombo.

Parameter.Documentation: is the name of the service combo to be found.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the name of the service combo to be found.
Parameter.Name: serviceCombo

@author Marc Saber

@author Marc Saber
Operation.Documentation_plain: Helper method to get the number of appointments for a specific service @author Marc Saber
Operation.Name: getNumAppForService

Operation.Documentation:
joinServicesjoinServices is a method that has the goal of listing all the services' names in one string by separating them by a ",".The first step to do it was to create an empty string, then take each service in the service combo and add its name to the end of the string.If it is the last service, only the name is added to the string of services.If it is not the last one, the name is added followed by a ",".By doing that for all the services we create a single string having all the names of the services of the given service combo.The last step is certainly to return this final string.

@author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Documentation_plain: joinServicesjoinServices is a method that has the goal of listing all the services' names in one string by separating them by a ",".The first step to do it was to create an empty string, then take each service in the service combo and add its name to the end of the string.If it is the last service, only the name is added to the string of services.If it is not the last one, the name is added followed by a ",".By doing that for all the services we create a single string having all the names of the services of the given service combo.The last step is certainly to return this final string. @author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Name: joinServices
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: String that has all the services in the service combo put as the input
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: String that has all the services in the service combo put as the input

Parameter.Documentation: is the service combo that has the services we want to have in the form of a string.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the service combo that has the services we want to have in the form of a string.
Parameter.Name: sc

Operation.Documentation:
joinMandatoriesjoinMandatories is a method that has the goal of listing all the services' mandatory statuses in one string by separating them by a ",".The first step to do it was to create an empty string, then take each service in the service combo and add its mandatory status to the end of the string.If it is the last service, only the mandatory status is added to the string of .If it is not the last one, the mandatory status is added followed by a ",".By doing that for all the services we create a single string having all the mandatory statuses of the services of the given service combo.The last step is certainly to return this final string.

@author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Documentation_plain: joinMandatoriesjoinMandatories is a method that has the goal of listing all the services' mandatory statuses in one string by separating them by a ",".The first step to do it was to create an empty string, then take each service in the service combo and add its mandatory status to the end of the string.If it is the last service, only the mandatory status is added to the string of .If it is not the last one, the mandatory status is added followed by a ",".By doing that for all the services we create a single string having all the mandatory statuses of the services of the given service combo.The last step is certainly to return this final string. @author Robert Aprahamian
Operation.Name: joinMandatories
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: String that has all the mandatory status of all the services in the service combo put as the input.
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: String that has all the mandatory status of all the services in the service combo put as the input.

Parameter.Documentation: is the service combo that has the services we want to find their corresponding mandatory status and have them in the form of a string.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: is the service combo that has the services we want to find their corresponding mandatory status and have them in the form of a string.
Parameter.Name: sc

Operation.Documentation:
The findTimeSlotOfApp is a helper method that calculates the time slot of an appointmentdepending on the start time, start date and duration of the appointment.

@author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Documentation_plain: The findTimeSlotOfApp is a helper method that calculates the time slot of an appointmentdepending on the start time, start date and duration of the appointment. @author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Name: findTimeSlotOfApp

Operation.Documentation:
The findAppointment method is a helper method that finds the desired appointment in the flexibookapplication using the username of the customer, and his appointment information(name, date, starttime).

@author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Documentation_plain: The findAppointment method is a helper method that finds the desired appointment in the flexibookapplication using the username of the customer, and his appointment information(name, date, starttime). @author Tamara Zard Aboujaoudeh
Operation.Name: findAppointment

Operation.Documentation:
This method adds a service to the database

@author chengchen
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method adds a service to the database @author chengchen
Operation.Name: addService
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation:
true if added successfully

@throws InvalidInputException

Parameter.Documentation: - name of the service to be added
Parameter.Documentation_plain: - name of the service to be added
Parameter.Name: name

Parameter.Documentation: - duration of the service to be added
Parameter.Documentation_plain: - duration of the service to be added
Parameter.Name: duration

Parameter.Documentation_plain: - the start time of the downtime of the service to be added
Parameter.Name: downtimeStart

Parameter.Documentation: - duration of the downtime of the service to be added
Parameter.Documentation_plain: - duration of the downtime of the service to be added
Parameter.Name: downtimeDuration

This is a query method which can get list of all services in the system

Operation.Documentation_plain: This is a query method which can get list of all services in the system @author chengchen
Operation.Name: getTOServices

Parameter.Documentation: - the name of the service to found

Parameter.Name: name

This method finds the appointments that has specified servicesThis is a private helper method but we put it public in this stage for testing.

Operation.Name: findAppointmentByServiceName

This is a private helper method but we put it public in this stage for testing.Returns a list of all the existing Service Combos

Operation.Name: getServiceCombos
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: List of all existing Service Combos
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: List of all existing Service Combos

Operation.Documentation:
Check if the time slot overlaps with other appointmentsolves constraint: checks whether there is no overlap between two time slots

@author AntoineW
Operation.Documentation_plain: Check if the time slot overlaps with other appointmentsolves constraint: checks whether there is no overlap between two time slots @author AntoineW
Operation.Name: isNotOverlapWithOtherTimeSlots

Operation.Documentation:
appointments do not overlap UNLESS the overlap is during the downtime;

@author AntoineW
Operation.Documentation_plain: appointments do not overlap UNLESS the overlap is during the downtime; @author AntoineW
Operation.Name: isDuringDowntime

Operation.Documentation:
appointment cannot be made on holidays or during vacation

@author AntoineW
Operation.Documentation_plain: appointment cannot be made on holidays or during vacation @author AntoineW
Operation.Name: isDuringWorkTime

Operation.Documentation:
Check if the appointment is made before now (which is not allowed)

@author AntoineW
Operation.Documentation_plain: Check if the appointment is made before now (which is not allowed) @author AntoineW
Operation.Name: isInTheFuture

Operation.Documentation:
Returns list of appointments in the future for a specific service

@author gtjarvis
Operation.Documentation_plain: Returns list of appointments in the future for a specific service @author gtjarvis
Operation.Name: getAppointmentsInTheFuture
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation: list of appointments for that service
Operation.ReturnTypeDocumentation_plain: list of appointments for that service

Parameter.Documentation: -specific bookable service
Parameter.Documentation_plain: -specific bookable service
Parameter.Name: b

Operation.Documentation:
wrapper method of isNotOverlapWithOtherTimeSlots(TimeSlot timeSlot), isDuringDowntime(TimeSlot timeSlot),isDuringWorkTime(TimeSlot timeSlot) and isInTheFuture(TimeSlot timeSlot)The method will return true if the timeslot passes through all 4 tests in a specific order.

@author AntoineW
Operation.Documentation_plain: wrapper method of isNotOverlapWithOtherTimeSlots(TimeSlot timeSlot), isDuringDowntime(TimeSlot timeSlot),isDuringWorkTime(TimeSlot timeSlot) and isInTheFuture(TimeSlot timeSlot)The method will return true if the timeslot passes through all 4 tests in a specific order. @author AntoineW
Operation.Name: isInGoodTiming

Operation.Documentation:
This method is a helper method determining the actual time of a appointmentIt will only be used for a serviceCombo.<p>This is implemented because customer can choose to not have certain optional services in a combo.

@author AntoineW
Operation.Documentation_plain:
This method is a helper method determining the actual time of a appointmentIt will only be used for a serviceCombo.

This is implemented because customer can choose to not have certain optional services in a combo. @author AntoineW
Operation.Name: calcActualTimeOfAppointment

Operation.Documentation:
This method is a helper method determining the actual time of a appointmentThis is the overloaded version, which simply adds all services time

@author AntoineW
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method is a helper method determining the actual time of a appointmentThis is the overloaded version, which simply adds all services time @author AntoineW
Operation.Name: calcActualTimeOfAppointment

Operation.Name: getDayFromString

Operation.Name: combineDateAndTime

Operation.Documentation:
returns the downtime time slots for a given appointment as List<TOTimeSlot>The reason why it returns TO is becausewe dont want to use the actual model since it will add timeslot in the system whichmesses up other check

@author AntoineW
Operation.Documentation_plain: returns the downtime time slots for a given appointment as List<TOTimeSlot>The reason why it returns TO is becausewe dont want to use the actual model since it will add timeslot in the system whichmesses up other check @author AntoineW
Operation.Name: getDowntimesByAppointment

Operation.Documentation:
Helper method to get the day of week by passing the date

@author AntoineW
Operation.Documentation_plain: Helper method to get the day of week by passing the date @author AntoineW
Operation.Name: getDoWByDate

Operation.Documentation:
This method parse the input string.A java String Tokenizer is used.This method can be used for general propose, but it was create to parse "cut, wash, ..." for the chosen itemin creating appointment out of a service combo.

@author AntoineW
Operation.Documentation_plain: This method parse the input string.A java String Tokenizer is used.This method can be used for general propose, but it was create to parse "cut, wash, ..." for the chosen itemin creating appointment out of a service combo. @author AntoineW
Operation.Name: parseString

Operation.Documentation: the services should be {ordered}; however, since Umple translates every * associationor composition into a list, it is possible to order items in that list given Umple's API
Operation.Documentation_plain: the services should be {ordered}; however, since Umple translates every * associationor composition into a list, it is possible to order items in that list given Umple's API
Operation.Name: getServices

Operation.Documentation: since there is only one business in this system, the first0..1 should be a 1. since this is a directed association, thefirst multiplicity is not taken into account. hence, it ischanged to 0..1 to avoid Umple issuing warning W036Unmanaged Multiplicity
Operation.Documentation_plain: since there is only one business in this system, the first0..1 should be a 1. since this is a directed association, thefirst multiplicity is not taken into account. hence, it ischanged to 0..1 to avoid Umple issuing warning W036Unmanaged Multiplicity
Operation.Name: getBusinessHours

Parameter.Documentation: Constructor used in the FlexiBookApplication class to initialize the user interface.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: Constructor used in the FlexiBookApplication class to initialize the user interface.
Parameter.Name: stage

Parameter.Documentation: Method for the whole user interface.
Parameter.Documentation_plain: Method for the whole user interface.
Parameter.Name: primaryStage

Operation.Documentation: Initialize the contents of the frame.
Operation.Documentation_plain: Initialize the contents of the frame.
Operation.Name: initialize
